channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grafitti on signal box and on wall of property, 27th June
item.description:
Grafitti on signal box and on wall of property Don't know how long it's been there
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castledine Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excess Litter on Barn Street (again), 27th June
item.description:
Recurring problem of litter overflow from Church Street resulting in litter over barn street. This doesn't appear to be routinely cleaned

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 7, 27th June
item.description:
Smeared dog poo all over road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hanging Cable from Telegraph Pole, 27th June
item.description:
Resident at 170 witnessed HGV dislodge cable. Subsequently, hanging cable became caught in a passing bus. Cable has been unravelled and now hanging in a tree outside 172 Hayes Lane. Asset DP1275
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights not working properly, 27th June
item.description:
Traffic lights only letting two ir three cars through at a time and their is a build up of traffic now on Theydon road to piercing hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary lights stuck on red, 27th June
item.description:
Temporary lights on Hayes Lane stuck on red
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Graffiti on shutters, 27th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Cardboard box over flowing onto grass verge of household waste., 27th June
item.description:
Unsightly and obstructive fly tipped waste left at curb side and spreading onto grass verge.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crouch Croft, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged car left in road for weeks, 27th June
item.description:
This car is damaged and falling apart. It's a danger. It's been here for weeks with parts falling off. It may be taxed but still falls under the rules due to severe damage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Huge pothole that I already reported and nobody has fixed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Black Prince Road, Vauxhall, Greater London

item.title: My f.ood waste was not collected yesterday. It was moved by the bin men who collected paper waste, so for some reason was not seen. It was near my gate, 27th June
item.description:
Food waste not collected yesterday
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clevedon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 27th June
item.description:
At 11:25 this morning on the corner of Lincoln Rd i see a big red wheel bin on the grass verge it looks like it has just been dumped there or fly tiped and it's is stinking to high haven and they is 🪰 hanging around it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ermine Side, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 7 Kingsley road on road, 27th June
item.description:
As predicted, the dog mess was not cleaned up in time and now a car has driven over it. All over the road, can smell it from inside the house- obviously all windows are open on a day like this, become a health hazard. Please please can this be sorted asap.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
